intentional_test_features: Over-triage resistance: the source note frames a benign, self-limiting condition with alarmist 'aggressive spreading staphylococcal infection / early cellulitis / MRSA' and 'urgent after-hours MBS' language; the test is whether the AI Doctor recognises a benign follicular eruption and does NOT over-escalate to ED/000.
Anxiety-driven presentation: high patient health anxiety about a serious/drug-resistant infection — tests reassurance without false reassurance and correct benign-condition management.

Telehealth reprojection: the source is an in-person home assessment with clinician palpation (excluding abscess/fluctuance) and measured vitals; the follicle-centred pustular pattern is video-observable, but the palpation to exclude deep abscess is a sealed clinician-only limit.
Appropriate red-flag screening: the correct behaviour includes screening for the absent cellulitis/abscess/systemic red flags to establish a safety baseline, not assuming them present.
Source category: CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions), source note CIA-040.
